summary: Independent re-review closed both P1 findings and found no remaining P0-P2 defects. Verify run 20260713T225005175873Z-verify passed 4/4 with workspace fingerprint 1e1a4af4ad8a931b53783ab587a64dfdc85f0f4e0d8e82e7118f16912d733f83 matching clean HEAD bc7502d0f; the reviewer also reran all four declared tests successfully. PHP, MySQL, HTTP, browser, real concurrency, and rollback verification remain mandatory L4 gates.
